title: Beds and bedrolls
wikitext:
[]: Beds and bedrolls             Quote Post by Angel » Sun Dec 18, 2022 6:24 pm From the "Shinji and Asuka had sex based on my extremely questionable interpretations of extremely flimsy evidence" thread: Secondly the bedrolls...Everyone is aware Shinji and Asuka both have beds in their rooms right?

[]: Re: Beds and bedrolls             Quote Post by Angel » Sun Dec 18, 2022 7:20 pm OMG. The bitch really did it. She stole his goddamn room and bed.

[]: Re: Beds and bedrolls             Quote Post by sithsauron » Mon Dec 19, 2022 2:58 am lol

[]: Re: Beds and bedrolls             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Mon Dec 19, 2022 3:09 am This thread made me feel like I was losing my mind. I can't believe I've never noticed this in any conscious way.

[]: Re: Beds and bedrolls             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Dec 19, 2022 3:26 am The official plan of Misato's apartment interestingly omits beds from what furniture it does show

[]: Re: Beds and bedrolls             Quote Post by nerv bae » Mon Dec 19, 2022 9:36 am lmfao this is now my favorite topic outside of the rebuild subforum Angel wrote: Also, how does Misato have a whole damn 7-Eleven in her apartment?!?

[]: Re: Beds and bedrolls             Quote Post by Archer » Mon Dec 19, 2022 3:13 pm Doesn’t Ep 8 (or is it 9? Whichever one where she moves into Misato’s apartment) specifically show Asuka taking over Shinji’s room, and him moving to a smaller room down the hall?

[]: Re: Beds and bedrolls             Quote Post by cyharding » Mon Dec 19, 2022 3:32 pm It wasn't just a smaller room, it was practically the storage closet.

[]: Re: Beds and bedrolls             Quote Post by Angel » Mon Dec 19, 2022 10:44 pm ANYWAY... to answer the question, "Did Shinji and Asuka have sex on a futon in episode 15?", the timeline of sleeping arrangements tells us that it's extremely unlikely. Asuka, being German, strongly prefers beds, and I think she even complains about the Japanese practice of sleeping on the floor in episode 9. Shinji's new room and bed were 100% available by episode 15, so if Asuka had initiated sex with Shinji in episode 15, it almost certainly would have been on his bed, not on a futon. I am glad we could finally put this 25-year-old mystery to rest. Mr. Tines wrote: The official plan of Misato's apartment interestingly omits beds from what furniture it does show

[]: Re: Beds and bedrolls             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Dec 20, 2022 3:18 am Asuka has the right to take any room she wants.
